summary: Comprehensive testing of Webinar Psikologi Sedekah landing page, ticketing system, and legal pages. All backend APIs and frontend flows working correctly. TriPay payment integration shows 'not available' message as expected (no API key configured - Phase 1+2).

minor.issue: Returns empty array due to missing TRIPAY_API_KEY - EXPECTED behavior for Phase 1+2

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Added missing TRIPAY_API_KEY, TRIPAY_PRIVATE_KEY, TRIPAY_MERCHANT_CODE, and get_tripay_base_url() function definitions in server.py - these were referenced but not defined, causing NameError
seed_data_creation: Created test registrations: TEST_User Individu, TEST_User Duo, TEST_User Lembaga, TEST_Lookup User, TEST_E2E User (all with PENDING_PAYMENT status)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Webinar system Phase 1+2 complete. All features verified: landing page with all sections (hero, countdown, pain-agitate-solution, what you'll learn, speaker, social proof, urgency, ticket form, FAQ, final CTA), ticket selection (3 options with correct prices), form submission flow, payment page showing invoice details, confirmation page showing pending status, legal pages (Ketentuan Layanan and Kebijakan Privasi), mobile sticky CTA. TriPay payment channels return empty (expected - no API key configured yet). Event seeded in MongoDB with slug 'psikologi-sedekah'. Invoice format: MWN-PS-YYYYMMDD-XXXX.

backend_api_tests: ✓ GET /api/webinar/events/psikologi-sedekah - returns event with ticket_prices, seats_remaining
✓ POST /api/webinar/register (individu) - creates registrant, returns invoice MWN-PS-*, amount=85000
frontend_landing_page: ✓ Hero section with badge, title, CTA button visible
✓ Countdown showing 4 time boxes (Hari, Jam, Menit, Detik)
✓ 'What You'll Learn' section with 8 learning items
✓ Social proof section with stats and testimonials
frontend_ticket_form: ✓ 3 ticket options displayed: Individu (Rp85.000), Duo (Rp149.000), Lembaga (Rp199.000)
✓ Form fields: name, email, whatsapp, role dropdown all working
frontend_payment_page: ✓ Invoice card shows: invoice_id, name, ticket type, amount
✓ Payment method card shows 'Metode pembayaran belum tersedia' (expected)
frontend_confirmation_page: ✓ Action buttons: 'Kembali ke Halaman Pembayaran', 'Hubungi Admin'
frontend_legal_pages: ✓ /ketentuan-layanan - 9/9 sections present, TriPay and webinar mentioned
frontend_footer: ✓ Ketentuan Layanan link in footer, navigates correctly
✓ Kebijakan Privasi link in footer, navigates correctly
mobile_responsive: ✓ Sticky CTA visible at bottom on mobile viewport (390x844)
✓ Sticky CTA shows 'Simpan Kursi Saya — Mulai Rp 85.000'

tripay_status: NOT CONFIGURED (expected for Phase 1+2) - payment channels return empty list, payment method card shows fallback message with WhatsApp contact
